content.full_text:
September 24, 1992

Mr. John W. Wallace  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Request for Opinion

Dear Mr. Wallace:

In response to your request for information regarding the population within the 1500 radius of the Sky Park project, we submit the following. Based on the 1990 federal census, we have determined there are 1,721 individuals living within the 1500 foot radius out of a total population of 8,615, i.e., 19.97%. The total population of Scotts Valley as of January 1992, by the City's unofficial count, was 9,118. Even assuming the number of residents living within the 1500 radius remained constant, that still represents 18.87% of the population of the City of Scotts Valley.

Given this new information, could you please confirm that the effect on the public generally would be considered the same as the effect on the planning director. We would appreciate your prompt reply. If you have any other questions, please do not hesitate to call.

Sincerely yours,

Robert J. Logan  
City Attorney

RJL/kl  
cc: Hanna
